tagline: A new skill, delivered to your door.
elevator_pitch: SkillPost is a subscription box that ships you everything you need to learn a new hands-on skill, from ukulele to watercolors to calligraphy. Each box includes quality materials, a curated step-by-step video course, and achievable 30-day goals so you actually follow through.
problem: Most people want to pick up new hobbies and skills but never follow through. The barrier to entry is just high enough to stop them: choosing the right materials, finding quality instruction, and staying motivated through the learning curve.
solution: SkillPost removes every obstacle by shipping a complete kit with beginner-friendly materials and a curated, MasterClass-quality video course. Each box focuses on one achievable goal you can hit in 30 days, giving you skin in the game and a clear path to progress.
target_market: Adults aged 25-55 who want to explore creative hobbies but struggle with follow-through. Secondary market includes gift-givers and older adults who prefer physical learning over pure digital platforms.
revenue_model: Quarterly subscription boxes at $40-60 per box. Premium tier includes one-on-one video tutoring sessions. Affiliate revenue from upselling full equipment and advanced courses from partner brands. Sponsored product placement inside boxes.
key_features: Complete skill kits with quality beginner materials shipped to your door
Curated MasterClass-style video courses with 30-day milestone goals
Premium tier with live one-on-one video tutoring from skilled instructors
Catalog browsing experience to choose your next skill each quarter
competitive_advantage: Unlike Skillshare or YouTube, SkillPost combines physical materials with consistently high-quality instruction in a single package. The tangible box creates commitment that digital-only platforms cannot match, similar to how HelloFresh outperforms recipe apps.
market_size_estimate: The subscription box market is valued at $32B globally. Online learning is a $300B+ market. SkillPost sits at the intersection, targeting the estimated 40M+ U.S. adults interested in creative hobbies, representing a $2-5B addressable market.
go_to_market: Launch with 5-8 curated skill boxes (ukulele, watercolor, calligraphy, harmonica, knitting) and a direct-to-consumer Shopify store. Partner with skilled instructors on revenue share. Build early traction through lifestyle influencers and gift-guide placements.
risks: High per-box cost of physical goods and shipping could squeeze margins
Content production for each new skill requires significant upfront investment
Customer churn if novelty wears off or boxes feel repetitive over time
year_one_milestones: Launch with 8 skill categories and 2,000 subscribers in first 6 months
Introduce premium tutoring tier and generate 20% of revenue from upsells
